zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Paveley於1296年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Robert de Paveley VI27歲，母親Elizabeth Shampevelk21歲。他於1323年與Joan Sturly or Sturry在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Paveley于1296年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Paveley VI27岁，母亲Elizabeth Shampevelk21岁。他于1323年与Joan Sturly or Sturry在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1391年享年95岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pavelin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Paveley ( see Pawley ) with an excrescent -n.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Paveley was born in 1296, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Paveley VI, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Shampevelk, was 21. He married Joan Sturly or Sturry in 1323, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1391, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Paveley est né en 1296, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Paveley VI, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Shampevelk, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Sturly or Sturry en 1323, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1391, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Paveley 1296 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Paveley VI 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Shampevelk 21. Er hat 1323 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Joan Sturly or Sturry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1391 im Alter von 95 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Paveley è nato il nel 1296 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Paveley VI, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Shampevelk, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan Sturly or Sturry nel 1323, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1391, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Paveleyが1296年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Paveley VIは27歳，母Elizabeth Shampevelkは21歳であった。1323年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでJoan Sturly or Sturryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年に95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Paveley(이)가 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Paveley VI(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Shampevelk(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1323년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Joan Sturly or Sturry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Paveley nasceu em 1296, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Paveley VI, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Shampevelk, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Sturly or Sturry em 1323, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1391, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Paveley родился в 1296 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Paveley VI было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Shampevelk, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Sturly or Sturry в 1323 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1391 г. в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Paveley nació en 1296, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Paveley VI, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Shampevelk, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan Sturly or Sturry en 1323, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1391, a la edad de 95 años.
